title: Letaki
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Orbus.jpg]] |name=Letaki |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Pink]]{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor=Black |distinctions=Eight [[Limb/Legends|tentacles]], four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] and [[Water/Legends|water]] gills{{FactFile|46|MAX 1-2|The Max Rebo Band}} |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivorous]][[Star Wars (1998) 12|''Star Wars'' (1998) 12]] |language= }} {{Quote|Now leave! Before I gut you like a Letaki's dinner!|[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]] to [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Hutt]]|}} The '''Letaki''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings distinguished by eight [[Limb/Legends|tentacles]], an [[Egg/Legends|egg]]-shaped head, four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and a sharp beak. Two sets of gills allowed them to breathe in both [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]] and [[Water/Legends|water]]. They were able to focus their eyes on more than one object at a [[Time/Legends|time]], and to use their limbs to manipulate several items independently. As [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]], Letaki gutted their dinners. The Letaki vocal range was higher than that of most species. The [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]], leader of [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]], was a Letaki. ==Biology and appearance== [[File:DoikkNats-TVD.jpg|160px|thumb|180px|left|The Letaki species' sense of hearing was inferior to that of another species, the Bith (pictured).]] With eight [[Limb/Legends|tentacles]] and at least two feet, the Letaki were a non-[[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were able to use several tentacles in tandem, which allowed a Letaki [[Musician/Legends|musician]] to play a number of instruments simultaneously. The sheer multiplicity of their appendages made it difficult for non-Letaki to keep all the manipulators apart, a weakness that the Letaki [[Evar Orbus/Legends|Evar Orbus]] exploited by wearing a prosthetic arm in which he hid a weapon. At least some Letaki sported [[Color/Legends|pink]] skin mottled with a darker shade. An ovoid head sat atop the Letaki neck and torso. The [[Egg/Legends|egg]]-shaped [[Bone/Legends|cranium]] featured four{{CSWECite|II|251|Letaki}} shiny, [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]; a sharp, stubby, yellow [[Mouth/Legends|beak]]; and two pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. A Letaki was able to focus each of the four visual organs independently, an ability that allowed members of the species to monitor several directions at once. Their sense of hearing was comparatively less developed, falling below the aural capabilities of the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] species. The Letaki tongue was dark pink in color. Six short, fleshy appendages with ventral suction cups formed a line across the brow. Letaki had two sets of gills, which enabled them to breathe both in an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] and [[Water/Legends|underwater]]. The air gills resembled flaps of skin,{{CSWECite|II|419|Orbus, Evar}} located behind the eyes.''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Letaki had male and female [[Gender/Legends|genders]]. They were [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] who gutted their dinner before eating it. When he encountered a group of Letaki around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],{{WebCite|url=https://marthawells.livejournal.com/526309.html|text=The Star Wars Leia Book|work=[https://marthawells.livejournal.com marthawells.livejournal.com]|archivedate=20130120232348}} the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] assumed the Letaki beak would make drinking difficult; nevertheless, the Human found the tentacled beings' behavior erratic and assumed they were intoxicated. Letaki [[Blood/Legends|blood]] was colored green. The species was capable of prodigious vocal abilities; the voice of Evar Orbus, for instance, ranged across eleven [[sectave]]s. ==Society and culture== Letaki used their tentacles to gesture and point during communication. They expressed emotions through their sense organs, which fluttered to convey feelings. Conversely, Han Solo assumed that Letaki likely would not to be able to read the subtleties of Human facial expressions. At least some Letaki were comfortable in arid environments like that of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Members of the species were known to wear clothing. ==Letaki in the galaxy== {{Quote|Wait! I'm Evar Orbus!''"
"''So?''"
"''Of the Evar Orbus Galactic Jizz-wailers. Perhaps you've heard of us?|Evar Orbus and a Bith musician|}} [[File:Max_Rebo.jpg|thumb|right|Max Rebo, who took over Evar Orbus's band following the latter's death]] One Letaki who gained a level of prominence in the galaxy was Evar Orbus, a musician native to the planet [[Letaki (planet)|Letaki]],''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]'' who founded a [[Band/Legends|band]] known as [[Evar Orbus and His Galactic Jizz-Wailers]]. When Orbus and his group made their way to Tatooine under a contract to play at the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chalmun/Legends|Chalmun's]] [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina]], Orbus felt he had hit the big time. However, the cantina's current band, [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes]], resented the competition; under the pretense of sending an [[Airbus/Legends|airbus]] to transport Orbus and his group to their new performance venue, they attacked the Letaki and his crew. Although Orbus was able to defend himself with a weapon hidden in a fake tentacle, he was [[Death/Legends|fatally]] wounded in the skirmish. The other members of his group, under the nominal leadership of the [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]], renamed themselves the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]] and found work for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], a group of Letaki was present within a played-out [[Unidentified asteroid mine|asteroid mine]]. The Letaki were approached by the Human [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Alia Terae]], whom they told about the [[Slavery/Legends|slave trade]] that passed through the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] and the path through the [[Mining/Legends|mine's]] tunnels to reach the slave holding pens. Terae then led her companions, Han Solo and the Human [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Sian Tesar]], per the Letaki's instructions.''[[Razor's Edge]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Author [[John Gregory Betancourt]] created the Letaki Evar Orbus for his short story "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," which was included in the [[1996]] [[Bantam Spectra]] collection ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]''. In [[2002]], the [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 46|forty-sixth issue]] of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' magazine misspelled the species's name as "Lataki." The species was first visually depicted when Orbus was drawn by artist [[Justine Mara Andersen]] for the article "[[Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band]]," published in the [[April 15]], [[2003]]{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2003/03/news20030317.html|text=Celebrate Jedi's 20th in ''Insider'' #67}} [[Star Wars Insider 67|sixty-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, but the portrait lacks the additional pair of eyes and visible gills which ''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 46 describes Orbus as having, characteristic of his species. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 12|''Star Wars'' (1998) 12]] {{Mo}} *''[[Razor's Edge]]'' {{Ab|Razor's Edge (audiobook)}} *{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{FactFile|46|MAX 1-2|The Max Rebo Band}} {{ID|Lataki}} *{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}} {{1stp}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|organization|maxreboband|Max Rebo Band}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{SW|url=news/slugthrowers-part-2|series=Slugthrowers: An Overview of Popular Music and Musicians in a Galaxy Far, Far Away|text=Part 2|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Letaki |nl=Letaki }} [[Category:Sentient species]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Letaki]] }}
